artPrompt: A scrappy goblin rogue cornering someone in a narrow alley, one hand outstretched palm-up demanding payment, a cocky sneer half-lit by a flickering amber bulb above; he clutches a small stolen sack, ink-black shadows and smoky brown haze swallowing the alley walls behind him, the small cruelty rendered intimate and almost wistful, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Petty Extortionist
text: Whenever Petty Extortionist deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice a Favor token. If you do, that player discards a card. Collections is a contact sport.
flavorText: He started small: lunch money, then lunch, then the bag the lunch came in.
